hero.title: Radiant Waves Media Late Night Global News
hero.description: Wednesday, July 15, 2026 | Late Night Edition. Bringing you verified breaking news, World Cup updates and major developments from around the globe.

breaking: 🔴 Argentina defeat England 2-1 with a dramatic late comeback to reach the FIFA World Cup Final
🔴 Spain will face Argentina in Sunday's FIFA World Cup Final
🔴 England will play France in the third-place playoff
🔴 World leaders continue diplomatic engagement over Middle East security
🔴 Europe remains under severe heatwave and wildfire alerts
🔴 Nigeria sustains nationwide operations against terrorists, bandits and kidnappers
🔴 Global markets continue monitoring inflation, oil prices and interest-rate expectations
🔴 Artificial intelligence investment continues expanding across major economies

featured.title: Argentina Complete Dramatic Comeback To Reach Final
featured.content: Argentina fought back from a goal down to defeat England 2-1 in Atlanta. Anthony Gordon gave England the lead before Enzo Fernandez equalised late in the match. Lautaro Martinez then scored the winning goal in stoppage time to send the defending champions into the FIFA World Cup Final, where they will meet Spain on Sunday. 0

articles.title: Argentina Reach Another World Cup Final
articles.description: Argentina booked their place in the FIFA World Cup Final after defeating England 2-1 with two late goals in Atlanta. 1

articles.title: England Miss Out On Historic Final
articles.description: England led through Anthony Gordon but conceded twice late in the game, ending their hopes of reaching a first World Cup Final since 1966. 2

articles.title: Spain Await Argentina In Final
articles.description: Spain will face Argentina in Sunday's FIFA World Cup Final after eliminating France 2-0 in the first semi-final. 3

articles.title: Third-Place Playoff Confirmed
articles.description: France and England will meet in the FIFA World Cup third-place playoff before the championship match takes place this weekend. 4

articles.title: Middle East Diplomacy Continues
articles.description: International diplomatic efforts remain focused on regional stability, humanitarian assistance and reducing tensions across the Middle East.

articles.title: Europe Faces Continuing Heatwave
articles.description: Several European countries remain under heat and wildfire warnings as exceptionally high temperatures continue across parts of the continent.

articles.title: Atlanta Hosts Dramatic Semi-Final
articles.description: Supporters witnessed one of the tournament's most dramatic matches as Argentina staged a late comeback to eliminate England. 5

articles.title: Nigeria Continues Security Operations
articles.description: Security agencies remain engaged in coordinated operations against insurgents, terrorists, bandits and kidnapping gangs across affected regions.

articles.title: African Trade Cooperation Expands
articles.description: African governments continue strengthening regional trade, investment and infrastructure partnerships under the African Continental Free Trade Area.

articles.title: Asia Advances Technology Investment
articles.description: Governments and technology companies continue investing in artificial intelligence, semiconductor production and digital infrastructure.

articles.title: Markets Watch Inflation And Energy Prices
articles.description: Investors continue monitoring inflation, central-bank policy decisions and crude oil prices as global economic uncertainty persists.

articles.title: AI Investment Continues Worldwide
articles.description: Technology firms and governments continue expanding investment in artificial intelligence, cloud computing, robotics and cybersecurity.

articles.title: Global Leaders Focus On Stability
articles.description: Governments continue balancing economic growth, security cooperation and diplomatic engagement amid evolving geopolitical challenges.
